context: Cloud-API frontier-judge re-eval (task #122 round 7) post iter-275 v8 engine promotion + iter-336 PHI source-scan lock-in. Companion to round-6 local-LLM run (composite 7.56 on n=5/6 Ollama Q4_K_M judges). Round-7 uses xAI Grok 4.1 fast-reasoning, Mistral Large, DeepSeek-Chat, Perplexity Sonar Pro, NVIDIA Nemotron Ultra 253B — frontier-tier reasoning models for higher-quality signal.

blocking_gaps_for_10_10.gap: No explicit clinical advisor review, full FHIR R4 coverage details, or 21 CFR Part 11 compliance evidence.
Lacks head-to-head benchmarks against Epic Sense, Hippocratic AI, or OpenEvidence on live cohorts.
Demo dashboard visuals inferred but no screenshots or density/hierarchy details provided in package.

strengths: Bit-identical Q16.16 reproducibility primitive with full audit-chain pinning and replay scripts.
Comprehensive JUDGES.md with 5-minute all-gates PASS command and 1300+ pinned tests.
Apache-2.0 clarity with explicit patent grant and mind-mem ecosystem integration.

blocking_gaps_for_10_10.gap: Lacks peer-reviewed publication or preprint demonstrating novel CS contributions beyond BitNet b1.58 adaptation.
No explicit 21 CFR Part 11 audit trail or NPI-linked advisor attestation in submitted materials.
Dashboard screenshots or live demo lack the information density and brand consistency expected for clinical-grade software.

strengths: Bit-identical Q16.16 reproducibility with SHA-256 audit hashes, enabling FDA SaMD defensibility.
100% recall on contraindicated drug pairs with 0 false positives, validated against OpenEvidence-cited cohort.
Apache-2.0 license with explicit patent grant and no buried licensing, enabling immediate production deployment.
1371+ tests with CI green, including bundle integrity pins and clinical cohort validation.
JUDGES.md provides a 5-minute audit path with single-command verification of all safety gates.

blocking_gaps_for_10_10.gap: No named clinical advisor or formal NPI-linked review; FHIR coverage is claimed but not demonstrated with a live FHIR server integration test.
No screenshots or design system evidence in the submission; information density and brand consistency cannot be assessed.
The 5-second comprehension is hindered by the massive JUDGES.md; a concise hero demo video or interactive walkthrough is missing.

strengths: Bit-identical Q16.16 fixed-point replay with SHA-256 audit chain is a genuine FDA SaMD reproducibility primitive, unmatched by any other submission.
100% recall on contraindicated class (44/44) with zero false positives on a 10-pair negative control cohort, backed by a 1371-test suite.
Apache-2.0 with explicit patent grant and full open-source ecosystem fit (mind-mem, MIND Lang, arch-mind governance).
Six-layer safety pipeline with deterministic tables, OpenEvidence, RxNorm, LLM consensus, and BitNet veto layer shows deep clinical engineering rigor.
Comprehensive audit trail with pinned bundle hashes, versioned weight files, and cross-pin tests for every claim on the dashboard.
